en_title: Halo: Campaign Evolved Collector's Edition Includes a Relic of a Bygone Gaming Era
cn_title: 《光环：战役进化》典藏版附赠实体说明书，致敬逝去的游戏时代
subtitle: 实体说明书回归
opus_summary: 微软宣布《光环：战役进化》典藏版包含实体说明书，致敬物理媒介时代。游戏将于7月28日登陆Xbox Series X|S、PS5和PC。

paragraphs.en: Halo: Campaign Evolved isn't just remaking a 25 year old game, it's remaking the entire era it comes from.
paragraphs.cn: 《光环：战役进化》不仅是在重制一款25年前的游戏，更是在重现那个时代的整个风貌。

paragraphs.en: Yesterday, Microsoft confirmed that Halo: Campaign Evolved, a campaign-only remake of the original Halo game, will finally release in late July . Not only that, but it will also be released in style. Microsoft is releasing two special editions for the game, one of which is your typical digital-only version with in-game goodies. The other is an expensive, physical collector's edition that will celebrate Halo in a big way. The collector's edition includes a bunch of in-game items, a 12-inch statue of Master Chief, a steelbook, and some art prints.
paragraphs.cn: 昨日，微软确认《光环：战役进化》——一款仅包含战役的原版《光环》重制版——将于7月底正式发售。不仅如此，它还将以豪华阵容登场。微软为该作推出两个特别版本：一个是常见的纯数字版，附带游戏内道具；另一个则是昂贵的实体典藏版，旨在隆重致敬《光环》。典藏版包含大量游戏内物品、一尊12英寸的士官长雕像、一个铁盒以及一些艺术画册。

paragraphs.en: However, the more unique item is that it also includes a "reimagined" version of the original game's manual. Video game manuals have largely been out of style for over a decade. The last time games really seemed to include a detailed manual was back in the late 2000s during the Xbox 360 and PS3 era. However, that generation also saw the end of a meaty manual. It eventually shifted towards a very basic pamphlet that included safety warnings and legal notices, but there weren't any detailed write-ups, pictures, or helpful tips.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，最独特的是它还附赠了一本原版游戏说明书的「重制版」。游戏说明书已基本过时超过十年。上一次游戏真正附带详细说明书，还要追溯到2000年代末的Xbox 360和PS3时代。然而，那一代主机也见证了厚实说明书的终结。最终它演变成一本非常基础的小册子，只包含安全警告和法律声明，不再有详细的文字说明、图片或实用技巧。

paragraphs.en: Part of this was to save costs/paper, but also because the internet made manuals somewhat redundant. Anything you want to know about a game can easily be found online. As time has moved on, consoles themselves have even tried to incorporate features with useful information for whatever game you're playing. Still, it absolutely devalued the overall physical package. To make matters worse, collector's editions for PlayStation games this generation often don't feature a disc, partially to make them appealing to those who have a digital-only PS5.
paragraphs.cn: 部分原因是为了节省成本/纸张，但也因为互联网让说明书变得有些多余。你想知道的关于游戏的任何信息，都可以轻松在网上找到。随着时间的推移，主机本身甚至尝试整合功能，为你正在玩的游戏提供有用信息。尽管如此，这无疑降低了整个实体包装的价值。更糟糕的是，本世代PlayStation游戏的典藏版通常不包含光盘，部分原因是为了吸引那些拥有纯数字版PS5的玩家。

paragraphs.en: All of this has made physical media enjoyers very upset, but Xbox is trying to rectify it with this new Halo collector's edition. Not only does it have a physical manual, inspired by the original game, but it also includes a disc if you purchase an Xbox or PS5 version of the game. Unfortunately, Microsoft doesn't appear to be putting the entire game on the disc, as the game's standard edition packaging indicates a download will be required.
paragraphs.cn: 这一切让实体媒介爱好者非常不满，但Xbox正试图通过这款新的《光环》典藏版来纠正这一点。它不仅包含一本受原版游戏启发的实体说明书，而且如果你购买Xbox或PS5版本，还会附带一张光盘。不幸的是，微软似乎并未将整个游戏放在光盘上，因为游戏标准版的包装显示需要下载。

paragraphs.en: In related news, Halo: Campaign Evolved dropped another new trailer today , which was captured on PS5 Pro. The disclaimer was rather peculiar, especially after Xbox's very prominent messaging about exclusives and bringing power back to the Xbox brand.
paragraphs.cn: 相关消息方面，《光环：战役进化》今天又放出了一段新预告片，该预告片是在PS5 Pro上录制的。这个免责声明颇为奇特，尤其是在Xbox高调宣传独占内容并将力量带回Xbox品牌之后。

paragraphs.en: Halo: Campaign Evolved will be released on July 28th for Xbox Series X|S, PS5, and PC. Premium and collector's edition owners will get five-days of early access to the game as well.
paragraphs.cn: 《光环：战役进化》将于7月28日登陆Xbox Series X|S、PS5和PC。高级版和典藏版玩家还将获得五天的抢先体验资格。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人，报道游戏、电影等所有娱乐内容。你可以在X上关注他：@Cade_Onder。
